sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41484" key="e)pifa/neia2" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιφάν-εια</orth> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἱερά</foreign>), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>, <sense id="n41484.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sacrifices in celebration of an</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἐπιφάνεια, Δημήτριος τὰ ἐ. τοῦ ἀδελφοῦ θύων</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1245.tlg001:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Caryst.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
